sulu_ai.api_url_info: Base URL of the OpenAI-compatible API, e.g. https://api.openai.com/v1
sulu_ai.agent_name_info: Shown as the assistant window title; the assistant introduces itself by this name.
sulu_ai.custom_prompt_info: Appended to the assistant's system prompt. Applies to the assistant chat only.
sulu_ai.data_query_tables_info: One database table per line. Users with the "AI" role permission for data queries can let the assistant run read-only SELECT queries against these tables; results are sent to the configured AI endpoint. Recommended for form submissions: fo_forms, fo_form_translations, fo_form_fields, fo_form_field_translations, fo_dynamics. Leave empty to disable.
sulu_ai.generate_meta_save_first: Save the page before generating meta information.
sulu_ai.generate_meta_error: Meta generation failed. Check the AI settings and try again.
sulu_ai.assistant_placeholder: Ask about this page or request a change…
sulu_ai.assistant_export_failed: The CSV export failed. Please try again.
sulu_ai.assistant_applied: Applied — review the form and save.
sulu_ai.assistant_error: The assistant request failed. Check the AI settings and try again.
sulu_ai.assistant_conflict: The page changed since this proposal was created. Please ask the assistant again.
sulu_ai.assistant_unsaved_prompt: There are unsaved changes. Save them before switching?
sulu_ai.assistant_task_limit: I've taken quite a few automatic steps — please tell me explicitly how to continue.
sulu_ai.assistant_task_timeout: I couldn't continue the task automatically. Tell me when you're ready to go on.
sulu_ai.image_style_prompt_info: Always appended to every image prompt, e.g. brand look and tone.
sulu_ai.image_models_info: Models offered in the image generator. The API URL and key above are reused.
sulu_ai.image_prompt_placeholder: What should the image show? Subject, scene, mood, details…
sulu_ai.image_references_unsupported: Not all selected models support reference images.
sulu_ai.image_error: Generation failed. Check the AI settings and try again.
sulu_ai.assistant_expired: This proposal is from an earlier session and can no longer be applied.
sulu_ai.assistant_intro_greeting: Hi! Here's what I can help you with:
sulu_ai.assistant_intro_greeting_named: Hi, I'm {name}. Here's what I can help you with:
sulu_ai.assistant_intro_editing: Edit the page you have open — I propose changes, you approve them.
sulu_ai.assistant_intro_navigation: Find and open pages, articles, snippets and forms.
sulu_ai.assistant_intro_data: Answer questions about stored data, e.g. form submissions.
sulu_ai.assistant_intro_images: Generate images in the media library.
sulu_ai.media_meta_confirm_missing: Generate title and description for {count} images with missing meta? Existing values are kept.
sulu_ai.media_meta_confirm_selected: Generate title and description for {count} selected images? Existing values will be OVERWRITTEN.
sulu_ai.media_meta_nothing_missing: All images already have meta data.
sulu_ai.media_meta_aborted: The run was stopped because requests kept failing. Already generated meta data is saved.
sulu_ai.media_meta_cancelled: Cancelled. Already generated meta data is saved.
